title: BulkUpdateAction_VariableBody_
description: BulkUpdateAction_VariableBody_ schema from Apache Airflow API

action.title: Action
action.description: The action to be performed on the entities.

entities.title: Entities
entities.description: A list of entities to be updated.

update_mask.title: Update Mask
update_mask.description: A list of field names to update for each entity.Only these fields will be applied from the request body to the database model.Any extra fields provided will be ignored.
